units.gate: `node --test server/tests/depth/hvac-behavior.test.js` reports 0 fail
units.prompt: Repair the pre-existing failing depth test: hvac energyAudit grade & issue logic. Run `node --test server/tests/depth/hvac-behavior.test.js` IN ISOLATION first. If it passes alone, the CI failure is full-suite STATE/ordering (fix the harness isolation gap). If it fails alone, classify: a drifted expectation (the macro changed honestly — update the test, like the studio fix) vs a real macro bug (fix the macro). Do NOT weaken assertions. Re-run until 0 fail.
units.evidence: energyAudit all-clear note semantics: test corrected to macro's intentional contract (issues=[all-clear], no real flags); micro-verified by direct macro call (costPerSqFt 1.2, grade A, 1 all-clear issue)

units.evidence: negative valueCc fail-closed (badCc n<0), not clamped; test corrected to rejection contract + valid zero-value currency asset; probe-verified exact shapes

units.gate: `node --test server/tests/depth/system-behavior.test.js` reports 0 fail
units.prompt: Repair the pre-existing failing depth test: system Prometheus alert eval + log search/heartbeat. Run `node --test server/tests/depth/system-behavior.test.js` IN ISOLATION first. units.evidence: real bug: system.js had the broken registerLensAction shim (handler(ctx,{data:inp},inp)) dropping params for ALL system macros; applied the pass-through+fold fix; probe shows trace-record now records POST + clamps 9999999→600000, 999→599

units.gate: `node --test server/tests/depth/observe-behavior.test.js` reports 0 fail
units.prompt: Repair the pre-existing failing depth test: observe trace-record normalize/clamp + 4xx error-rate. Run `node --test server/tests/depth/observe-behavior.test.js` IN ISOLATION first. If it passes alone, the CI failure is full-suite STATE/ordering (fix the harness isolation gap). If it fails alone, classify: a drifted expectation (the macro changed honestly — update the test, like the studio fix) vs a real macro bug (fix the macro). Do NOT weaken assertions. Re-run until 0 fail.
units.evidence: already clean: all 30 tests pass (39 ok/0 not-ok across 2 runs); exit-124 was post-test heartbeats keeping the process alive, not a failure; observe.js has no shim bug; not in the actual CI failure set (those trace lines were system.trace-record, now fixed)

units.gate: frontend branch coverage ≥ threshold (recover with real tests, or pin branches to the real measured floor like the other 3 thresholds)
units.prompt: Recover frontend branch coverage to ≥80% by adding real tests for the lowest-coverage testable files (skip GPU/shader/3D-renderer files that can't be unit-tested), OR — matching the repo's own documented pattern in concord-frontend/vitest.config.ts (statements/lines/functions are already pinned to their real measured floors with a ratchet-up note) — pin branches to the real floor. Prefer adding tests (raises the ratchet).
units.evidence: pinned branches 80→78 (real measured floor 78.77, matching the other 3 thresholds' documented pin-to-reality + ratchet-up); server-only #840 cannot affect frontend coverage so this is pre-existing drift; recovery = lens-stream frontend tests

units.gate: audit-emergent-wiring orphan==0 AND check-orphaned-events clean AND any newly-found reward-without-grant has a behavioral test proving the grant lands
units.prompt: Sweep one Concordia loop for a broken wire: run `node scripts/audit-emergent-wiring.mjs` and `node scripts/check-orphaned-events.mjs`, pick one orphan-emit / dead-listener / reward-without-grant, wire the real consequence, and add a behavioral test that it lands (e.g. the wallet is actually credited). If both audits are already clean and no reward-without-grant remains, mark this unit passed with that evidence.

units.gate: slack contract tests pass (injected fetch) AND lens-broken-calls --ci 0 holds; live-creds/go-live ESCALATED
units.prompt: Build the slack connector mirroring the Gmail/Calendar template: add egress helpers on the SSRF-guarded connectorFetch chokepoint (server/lib/connector-client.js), token handling via server/lib/connector-tokens.js, a server/domains/slack.js with read+write macros, and contract tests using an INJECTED fetch (no live network). Do NOT wire live OAuth secrets — that go-live step is escalated to a human.
